title: FUGUEの実装を確認し、Kernelとの差分を埋めて。ただしFUGUE/kernel両方の既存のシステムを損壊しないように慎重に実装をマルチエージェントで進めて。
summary_text: **Direct substitution logic still present (policy/runtime)** - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/common-utils.sh:47` `resolve_claude_rate_limit_state()` still forces `ok -> degraded` when weekly utilization crosses threshold (`:68-74`), explicitly describing Codex/Kernel takeover. - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/orchestrator-policy.sh:56` Weekly pct arg is still accepted; effective state is still derived via resolver (`:154-163`), and `claude_state != ok` still auto-falls back main to `codex` (`:195-199`). - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/execution-profile-policy.sh:52` Weekly pct arg is still accepted; effective state is still derived via resolver (`:188-197`), then Claude assist demotion logic uses that state (`:177-180`). - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh:391` Weekly utilization is still converted into effective `claude_state` (`:391-403`), then fed into orchestrator policy resolution (`:669-680`, `:842-853`). - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh:186` Still passes `--claude-weekly-utilization-pct` into `orchestrator-policy.sh`. - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/gha24:266` Still fetches weekly utilization, resolves effective state (`:267-275`), passes weekly pct into policy (`:292-293`), and emits auto-fallback notice (`:305`). - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/resolve-claude-rate-limit-state.sh:60` Helper still defines weekly-threshold-driven state derivation (source marked `weekly-utilization-threshold` at `:66-69`). **Workflow-level residuals (propagate or apply weekly-derived state)** - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-task-router.yml:353` - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml:195` - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml:1276` - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml:1464` All still inject `FUGUE_CLAUDE_WEEKLY_UTILIZATION_PCT` into routing/caller paths. - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-status.yml:246` Still computes effective `claude_state` from weekly pct. - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-watchdog.yml:166` Still resolves state from weekly pct; weekly-derived source changes recovery behavior (`:193-194`, `:231-233`). - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-weekly-review.yml:30` Still computes and reports effective weekly-derived state. - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml:32` Weekly utilization variable is still wired into canary job env. **Tests still asserting weekly-driven auto substitution** - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-orchestrator-policy.sh:157` Asserts weekly>=90 causes `claude -> codex` fallback (`:158-174`). - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-execution-profile-policy.sh:121` Asserts weekly pct drives continuity demotion to `codex` assist (`:121-142`). - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh:160` Asserts weekly-derived degraded state and `orchestrator_provider=codex` (`:166-171`). - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-resolve-claude-rate-limit-state.sh:41` Unit tests still encode weekly-threshold forced state transitions.
